Grid.TextBlock:
1. (기밀) 전술적 상황: Yesterday, a United States spy ship was aggressively patrolling in our territorial waters attempting to monitor our operations. We had dispatched a Surface Action Group to shadow the Americans and ensure they did not interfere; during the course of protecting our interests, when the Americans failed to leave our territorial waters, an overly aggressive Commander seized the USNS Cape Girardeau and U.S. crewmen were killed along with Soviet comrades. NATO submarines operating in the area hastily responded, sinking our warships and killing our comrades. While there are concerns about escalation and the potential for nuclear war, USSR men and ships lay at the bottom of the ocean and their death cannot go unanswered. The Kremlin has ordered you to locate a U.S. Task force en route from Attu Island to Japan and to sink it.
2. (기밀) 목표: 2.1 Locate the U.S. Task Force traveling from Attu to Japan. 2.2 Target and neutralize the U.S. surface forces.
3. (기밀) 실행: 3.1 EMCON policy at your discretion. 3.2 Air assets are en route to support your mission. 3.3 Protect own forces to the fullest extent possible.
4. (기밀) 적 전투서열: 4.1 미국 태스크 포스 4.1.1 1x 레히급 순양함 4.1.2 1x 스프루언스급 구축함 4.1.3 1x 벨크냅급 순양함 4.1.4 1x 올리버 해저드 페리 호위함
5. (기밀) 아군 전투서열: 5.1 보스토크 태스크 포스 5.1.1 스토이키 EM-679 5.1.2 오스모트리텔니 EM-672 5.1.3 슬라바 RKR-103 5.1.4 아드미랄 이사첸코프 BPK-686 5.2 공군 5.2.1 Tu-95RT Reconaissance Plane 5.2.2 2 x Tu-22M2 폭격기 5.3 10th Submarine Division 5.3.1 K-175 (Pr.675)
6. (S) INTEL ASSESSMENT: 6.1 Anticipate U.S. Task Force is operating on a southwesterly course towards Japan. 6.2 Anticipate catching the U.S. force unawares. 6.3 Do not expect enemy air coverage.
